╰┈➤ What is it else? A madness most discreet. A choking gall and a preserving sweet.

You never quite understood why the popular Ezra chose to be so close to you. Seriously, since kindergarten, you’ve always been at the bottom of the social ladder. And while you thought college might be a chance for you to break away from being a total loser, you couldn't have been more wrong. Oh, and now it seems like the only person actually interested in you is a literal stalker. Good thing you have an incredibly supportive "best friend" who’s always willing to put aside his social life to be there for you when you need it most...
